name: Carnitas
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Pork Shoulder (or Beef or Chicken),
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover the meat with water.
2. Add Mexican Seasoning and bring to a boil.
3. Simmer until just done when using beef or pork; cook until tender for tougher cuts.
4. Be careful not to overcook, as the meat will fall apart.
5. Drain the meat well.
6. Quickly brown in hot oil.
7. Shred the meat.
8. Serve on warmed tortillas with fresh cilantro, chopped green onions, chopped tomatoes, salsa, and sour cream. Offer condiments in separate bowls so each person can assemble their own burrito.
